titleStmt.title: The Acting Secretary of State to the Ambassador in Uruguay ( (Dawson))

div.head: The Acting Secretary of State to the Ambassador in Uruguay ( Dawson )
div.p: 113. For SandersWilliam Sanders, Technical Consultant on the Staff of the Emergency Advisory Committee for Political Defense. from Spaeth. This Government is communicating to the other interested republics its preliminary view that the recent changes in the Argentine GovernmentFor correspondence on the withholding of recognition of the Farrell regime in Argentina by the United States, see pp. 252 ff. may well have been effected through the use of force and that, therefore, the procedure of consultation and exchange of information envisaged in Committee Resolution XXII should take place.

You should so inform Dr. Guani in the strictest confidence, and simultaneously express to him our keen desire that the situation remain completely in status quo pending the determination of the reactions of the various governments to this initiative on our part. You may assure him that we will continue to keep him fully informed concerning further pertinent developments. [Spaeth.]
